summary: Other long-term inflows net (BoP, current US$): difference between total long-term capital and IMF-reported items.
Private capital flows total (BoP, current US$): net foreign direct investment and portfolio investment.
Private capital flows total as percentage of GDP.
Portfolio investment net (BoP, current US$): cross-border flows in debt or equity securities.
Reserves and related items (BoP, current US$): net change in country's international reserve holdings.
Net secondary income (BoP, current US$): net transfers of income without repayment provisions.
Net current transfers as percentage of GDP.
Net capital account (BoP, current US$): acquisitions/disposals of nonproduced nonfinancial assets.
Official current transfers net (BoP, current US$): net government-to-government current transfers.
Private current transfers net (BoP, current US$): net private sector current transfers.
Workers' remittances net (BoP, current US$): net current transfers by migrant workers.
Personal remittances net (current US$): net personal transfers and employee compensation.
Grants (disbursements) from new commitments (BoP, current US$).
Percentage of respondents age 15+ who borrowed any money in past year from any source.
Percentage of women age 15+ who borrowed any money in past year from any source.
Percentage of men age 15+ who borrowed any money in past year from any source.
Agricultural tractors imports value in current US dollars from FAO.
Agricultural tractors imports quantity from FAO.
Cereal imports value in current US dollars from FAO.
Cereal imports quantity in tonnes from FAO.
Hazardous pesticides exports value in current US dollars from FAO.
Pesticides exports value in current US dollars from FAO.
Food exports excluding fish value in current US dollars (fob prices) from FAO.
Grants excluding technical cooperation (current US$): legally binding non-repayable commitments.
Grants excluding technical cooperation (BoP, current US$): cash, goods, or services transfers without repayment.
Technical cooperation grants (current US$): grants financing transfer of technical and managerial skills.
Technical cooperation grants (BoP, current US$): grants for technical and managerial skill transfer.
Total agricultural exports value in current US dollars from FAO.
ICT service exports value (BoP, current US$): computer, communications, and information services.
ICT service exports as percentage of service exports (BoP).
Communications, computer, information and other services as percentage of service exports (BoP).
Primary income receipts (BoP, current US$): compensation and investment income earned from abroad.
Exports of goods and services (BoP, current US$): change in economic ownership to nonresidents.
Exports of goods, services, income and workers' remittances (BoP, current US$).
Insurance and financial services as percentage of service exports (BoP).
Goods exports (BoP, current US$): change in economic ownership of goods to nonresidents.
Service exports (BoP, current US$): services provided by residents to nonresidents.
Charges for use of intellectual property, receipts (BoP, current US$): patent, trademark, copyright income.
Exports of goods, services and primary income (BoP, current US$).
Transport services exports value (BoP, current US$): sea, air, land, pipeline services provided abroad.
Transport services as percentage of service exports (BoP).
Travel services exports value (BoP, current US$): goods and services sold to inbound travelers.
Travel services as percentage of service exports (BoP).
Foreign direct investment net inflows in reporting economy (IMF-BoP, current US$).
Foreign direct investment net inflows in reporting economy (DRS, current US$).
Foreign direct investment net inflows (BoP, current US$): equity flows into reporting economy.
Foreign direct investment net inflows as percentage of GDP.
Primary income on FDI (current US$): direct investment income payments including equity and debt income.
Portfolio investment equity (DRS, current US$): net inflows from equity securities excluding direct investment.
Portfolio equity net inflows (BoP, current US$): equity securities flows excluding direct investment.
Secondary income receipts (BoP, current US$): current transfers received without quid pro quo.
Migrant remittance inflows in current US dollars: remittances received from workers abroad.
Migrant remittance inflows as percentage of GDP.
Official current transfers receipts (BoP, current US$): government-to-government transfers received.
Official transfers, current and capital (Credit, current US$): total official transfers received.
Private current transfers receipts (BoP, current US$): private sector transfers received.
Personal transfers receipts (BoP, current US$): transfers received by resident households from abroad.
Personal remittances received (current US$): personal transfers and employee compensation received.
Personal remittances received as percentage of GDP.
Workers' remittances receipts as percentage of GDP.
Firm entry rate: exporter-level customs data on firm entry into export transactions.
Firm exit rate: exporter-level customs data on firm exit from export transactions.
Entrant first year survival rate: customs data on exporter firm survival.
Share of entrants in total export value: customs data on new exporter contribution.
Entrant second year survival rate: customs data on exporter firm survival.
Entrant third year survival rate: customs data on exporter firm survival.
Additional population exposed to annual coastal floods due to sea level rise by 2100, as share of actual population.
Additional population exposed to annual coastal floods due to sea level rise by 2100, as share of actual population.
Additional population exposed to annual coastal floods due to sea level rise by 2050, as share of actual population.
Additional population exposed to annual coastal floods due to sea level rise by 2050, as share of actual population.
Nitrogen application rate measured in tons per hectare, derived from FAOSTAT fertilizer and crop data.
Additional people below $1.90/day as share of population from all climate change impacts combined.
Additional people below $1.90/day as share of population from climate impacts on agriculture revenues.
Additional people below $1.90/day as share of population from climate-related disasters.
Additional people below $1.90/day as share of population from climate-driven food price changes.

Additional people below $1.90/day as share of population from climate impacts on labor productivity.

CO2 emissions from building sector (Mt CO2 eq) from World Resources Institute Climate Watch.
Total CO2 emissions excluding land use change and forestry (Mt CO2 eq) from Climate Watch.
CO2 emissions from energy sector (Mt CO2 eq) from World Resources Institute Climate Watch.
CO2 emissions from fugitive emissions sector (Mt CO2 eq) from World Resources Institute Climate Watch.
Total CO2 emissions including land use change and forestry (Mt CO2 eq) from Climate Watch.
CO2 emissions from industrial processes sector (Mt CO2 eq) from Climate Watch.
CO2 emissions from land-use change and forestry sector (Mt CO2 eq) from Climate Watch.
